global.description: The ad features a simple and clean design with a focus on security and ease of use.
global.main_message: Promoting a secure and simple service called CoinBridge.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A vibrant solid green background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes, one circular and one rectangular, in a lighter shade of green.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: A small, unclear element that may not be visually distinct.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold black text stating 'Secure & simple' with a smaller tagline 'Built for peace of mind' underneath.
elements.text_content: Secure simple Built for peace of mind

elements.label: CoinBridge logo
elements.description: The logo 'CoinBridge' displayed in a prominent position at the top, in a bold font.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded black button with white text saying 'Order now' at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, minimalist with bold colors, CoinBridge, secure and simple service.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is positioned at the top, the main headline is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: CoinBridge, Secure & simple, Built for peace of mind, Order now
